name: mhl
description: My Health Logs: Organise and query your private health records

scripts.postinstall: [ "$CI" = 'true' ] || (command -v uv >/dev/null 2>&1 && cd pdf-parse && uv sync || echo 'uv not found; skipping Python deps sync')
scripts.dev:pdf-parse: cd pdf-parse && uv run fastapi dev app/main.py
scripts.start:pdf-parse: cd pdf-parse && uv run fastapi run app/main.py

author: Ayush Pahwa
